title: In Game VPN
description:
With this mod, you can use a VPN In Game! (Shift click to turn off after, and make sure to click the button at the top right of the menu to get the alive vpns!)
Join the discord to give suggestions or report bugs!
body:
# The InGame VPN Mod
## Open for suggestions
This mod is used to use a VPN without affecting outside of your game.
This can be used for many purposes, such as testing your Anti VPN.
Make sure to click the button at the top right of your menu!

How do I use it?
Next to the multiplayer button, there is a button which will appear as red. Click it, then select the button at the top right to select only alive VPNs. Shift click to disable and enable.
